user.title: Create TTS Proxy
user.description: Choose the TTS entity that should receive normalized text.

details.title: Configure TTS Proxy
details.description: Choose the output language supported by the selected Final TTS Entity, then configure replacements, date normalization, number spellout, and streaming buffer settings.

data_description.preview_text: Enter sample text to preview the normalized text that would be sent to the Final TTS Entity.

error.unsupported_output_language: The selected Final TTS Entity does not support this Output Language.
error.invalid_rule: One or more Replacement Rules are invalid.
error.invalid_date_normalizer: Select a supported Date Locale, Date Renderer, and at least one Date Input Format.
error.invalid_number_normalizer: Select a supported Number Spellout Language when the Number Normalizer is enabled.
error.invalid_buffer_config: Streaming Buffer Limit must be greater than Streaming Safety Tail.
